description_long: This mosque features a grand central structure with a large, ribbed dome flanked by two smaller domes, all with a slightly greenish patina. The main building is surrounded by a series of open, arched colonnades forming semi-circular porticos, giving it an airy and inviting appearance. Three tall, slender minarets with pointed conical roofs rise from the main structure, each topped with small, decorative cupolas. The minarets are vertically striated and have small balconies near their tops, typical of Islamic architecture. The exterior is finished in a pale, marble-like material with subtle weathering, and the overall form is symmetrical and monumental. There are no visible geometric patterns or Arabic calligraphy, and the design is reminiscent of Ottoman or fantasy-inspired Islamic architecture.
description: A grand mosque with a large central dome, three tall minarets, and open arched colonnades, finished in pale marble-like material with greenish domes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large central dome, two smaller domes, and three prominent minarets.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the height of the minarets and the layered arrangement of domes and colonnades.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the central dome, the minarets, and the symmetry of the structure.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the spiral staircase of a minaret and the semi-circular porticos.
attribute_dome: Three domes are visible: one large central dome and two smaller domes, all ribbed and topped with finials, with a greenish patina and placed symmetrically on the main structure.
attribute_minaret: Three tall, slender minarets with pointed conical roofs and small balconies, rising above the main structure and positioned at the corners and rear.
attribute_architectural_style: Ottoman-inspired with fantasy elements, characterized by large domes, tall minarets, and open arched colonnades.
